hero.description: A calmer way to find someone who fits, before the first appointment turns into guesswork.

stats.label: to stop scrolling without knowing where to begin
recommendations with an actual reason behind each one

how.title: Three clear steps
how.description: A short path from uncertainty to a first conversation that actually feels considered.

steps.title: Share what feels most important
steps.text: A few questions help us understand your pace, preferences, and what kind of support would feel right.

steps.title: See three strong matches
steps.text: We narrow the field and explain why each person stands out, so you are not scanning a directory alone.

steps.title: Reach out when one feels right
steps.text: Watch a short intro, send a first message, or book a quick call from the recommendation itself.

testimonials.title: What people say after they finally start
testimonials.description: A few voices from people who moved from browsing to a more considered first step.

faq.title: Questions that usually come up
faq.description: The practical details, without repeating the whole pitch.
faq.ctaDescription: Start with the standard match flow, or choose the longer version if you want to give the recommendation more detail.
